name: coTfsSDOResetAbortList
title: coTfsSDOResetAbortList
description: Form 1: Removes all entries of the previously received SDO abort codes from the internal list. The following call of coTfsSdoGetAbortCode returns 0.
Form 2: It is possible to omit the parameter nodeID. In this case, the internal saved value set with coTfsSetNodeId() is used as node-ID.

parameters.name: nodeID
parameters.description: 0 for all nodes or specific ID for the messages of an individual node.
